title: Cant Escape
lyrics: I can't escape you, I can't eat you, I can't escape all your lips I can't escape you, I can't forgive you, I can't see you, I can't forgive you Your piss calls my dog from down beneath my frozen heart It's choices and ego that block life from that waking wall Repeating thoughts of color, but will it ever end? Oh, will it ever end? Three hour news shackle with a regret The loss of a could-be son that cements a mindset Trapped with love that will never be reciprocated And many traps spinning away my dreams I don't understand the cool, it's just a rhetoric That haunts me, deceiving the light And solidifying new bars around my seams Your reprise just is packed with death I can't forget you, no, I can't escape any of the thoughts I can't escape you, I can't forgive you I still need him and that light in me Breath after breath, I can't escape Time after time, I can't find a way out Till I'm already ruined Late, lost, and singled out Negative surrounds the view which in me presides In me, the electric vein Rain, the last passage of a totterized soul No life breaks, this is me now This is my hope Breath after breath, time after time Breath after breath, I can't escape This correction I purportly just packed with death I can't forget you, I can't escape you I can't forget you, I can't escape you And I won't forgive you You, oh you, oh you A long-winded life, a yesterday where trouble was far away, far away Instead of destined to a future painted with brush strokes Formed from mediocrity You seek, this wall you weave Gnashes against the beauty of a soul Balancing act of pressure and stigma reframed Frustration of past mistakes could be arranged There's solely fate for me My subtle devil laughing as if to say it no Way to follow positive into the headspace Clear and concise, perfectly built to keep me here By the gossip of my own way I, I can't escape you I can't forgive you I won't forgive you I can't forgive you I can't escape you All this equals my ultimate prison cell that I can't escape All of this equals I can't escape you I can't forgive you I can't escape you

lyricsSegments.text: I can't escape you, I can't eat you, I can't escape all your lips
I can't escape you, I can't forgive you, I can't see you, I can't forgive you
Your piss calls my dog from down beneath my frozen heart
It's choices and ego that block life from that waking wall
Repeating thoughts of color, but will it ever end?
Oh, will it ever end?
Three hour news shackle with a regret
The loss of a could-be son that cements a mindset
Trapped with love that will never be reciprocated
And many traps spinning away my dreams
I don't understand the cool, it's just a rhetoric
That haunts me, deceiving the light
And solidifying new bars around my seams
Your reprise just is packed with death
I can't forget you, no, I can't escape any of the thoughts
I can't escape you, I can't forgive you
I still need him and that light in me
Breath after breath, I can't escape
Time after time, I can't find a way out
Till I'm already ruined
Late, lost, and singled out
Negative surrounds the view which in me presides
In me, the electric vein
Rain, the last passage of a totterized soul
No life breaks, this is me now
This is my hope
Breath after breath, time after time
Breath after breath, I can't escape
This correction I purportly just packed with death
I can't forget you, I can't escape you
I can't forget you, I can't escape you
And I won't forgive you
You, oh you, oh you
A long-winded life, a yesterday where trouble was far away, far away
Instead of destined to a future painted with brush strokes
Formed from mediocrity
You seek, this wall you weave
Gnashes against the beauty of a soul
Balancing act of pressure and stigma reframed
Frustration of past mistakes could be arranged
There's solely fate for me
My subtle devil laughing as if to say it no
Way to follow positive into the headspace
Clear and concise, perfectly built to keep me here
By the gossip of my own way
I, I can't escape you
I can't forgive you
I won't forgive you
I can't forgive you
I can't escape you
All this equals my ultimate prison cell that I can't escape
All of this equals
I can't escape you
I can't forgive you
I can't escape you
